goal: Add a side-effect-free evidence pack builder for BPK-084 memory-cache audit export permit-prep metadata, requiring evidence and reviewer refs while keeping permit issuance, file writes, durable persistence, external actions, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, providers, GitHub, and writes closed.
scope_out: Do not issue permits, write export files, add durable persistence, call external systems, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write files.
claims: Memory-cache audit export permit-prep metadata can be bundled as operator-review evidence without issuing a permit.
Evidence and reviewer refs are required for ready status.
File-write and durable persistence remain false.
assumptions: Actual permit issuance and export writing require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing evidence ref, and blocked permit-prep cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Permit issuance, file writes, durable persistence, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-084 prepared memory-cache audit export permit request metadata without issuing a permit or writing files.
